name: HYDRA
description: 402-native regulatory intelligence API for autonomous agents. 55+ paid endpoints from $0.001 USDC via x402 on Base L2. Real-time data from 13 authoritative sources: FRED (28 economic series), BLS, Treasury, SEC EDGAR, Federal Register, FDIC BankFind, Congress.gov, Fed RSS, Kalshi KXFED, Polymarket Gamma, Polymarket CLOB, Google DNS-over-HTTPS, CoinGecko. Market-calibrated Fed rate probabilities (60% KXFED / 40% model blend), FDIC bank failure monitoring, atomic economic snapshots, live regulatory pulse, alpha reports with edge analysis and Kelly sizing. Tier 1 government + Tier 3 CFTC-regulated data only.

workflows.name: Web Extraction
workflows.description: Structured web extraction — title, headings, clean text, links, OpenGraph metadata from any URL.

workflows.name: Web Search
workflows.description: Web search with structured result extraction — titles, snippets, URLs.

workflows.name: HTML to Markdown
workflows.description: Convert HTML to clean Markdown. Preserves headings, lists, links, code blocks, tables.

workflows.name: URL Health Check
workflows.description: URL health check — status code, response time, redirect chain, content type.

workflows.name: DNS Lookup
workflows.description: DNS record lookup — A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME.

workflows.name: SSL Certificate Check
workflows.description: SSL certificate inspection — issuer, expiry, SANs, days remaining.

workflows.name: Hash Text
workflows.description: Hash text with SHA-256, SHA-512, MD5, SHA-1, or SHA3-256.

workflows.name: Text Diff
workflows.description: Unified diff between two texts with change stats and similarity ratio.

workflows.name: Wikipedia Summary
workflows.description: Wikipedia article summary — extract, thumbnail, description, page URL.

workflows.name: arXiv Search
workflows.description: Search arXiv for academic papers — titles, authors, abstracts, PDF links.

workflows.name: SEC EDGAR Filings
workflows.description: Search SEC EDGAR for company filings — 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K.

workflows.name: Regulatory Risk Scan
workflows.description: Analyze a business against all applicable regulatory frameworks with scored impact assessment.

workflows.name: Prediction Market Signals
workflows.description: Bulk scored signals for all active regulatory prediction markets — HYDRA probability, impact scoring, signal direction. Data from Polymarket Gamma, Polymarket CLOB, and Kalshi KXFED. CFTC-regulated sources only.

workflows.name: Alpha Report
workflows.description: Premium alpha report — regulatory probability, edge vs market price, Kelly sizing, entry price, historical analogues, resolution timeline, trade verdict. Calibrated with Kalshi KXFED market data.

workflows.name: Token Price Lookup
workflows.description: Current price, 24h change, market cap for any listed token.

workflows.name: Economic Snapshot
workflows.description: Atomic real-time economic data from FRED (28 series), BLS employment, Treasury yields, FDIC bank health, and Federal Register rulemakings. All data fetched live at request time from Tier 1 government sources.

workflows.name: Live Regulatory Pulse
workflows.description: Live regulatory pulse from SEC EDGAR full-text search, Federal Register API, and Congress.gov bill tracker. Real-time data fetched at request time — not cached.

workflows.name: FDIC Bank Failure Monitor
workflows.description: FDIC BankFind API — recent bank failures, resolution details, estimated losses, acquiring institutions. Live government data.

workflows.name: Composite Alpha Signal
workflows.description: Composite alpha — regulatory risk + KXFED-calibrated Fed rate probability + prediction market sentiment + directional bias. 13-source data fusion.

workflows.name: Regulatory Risk Score
workflows.description: Real-time 0-100 risk score for any token or protocol based on regulatory exposure and agency attention.

workflows.name: Portfolio Risk Scan
workflows.description: Portfolio-level regulatory risk scan — up to 20 tokens/protocols with aggregate risk and cross-correlation analysis.

workflows.name: Executive Market Brief
workflows.description: Executive market brief — regulatory events + KXFED-calibrated Fed signal + prediction markets in one comprehensive view.

workflows.name: Regulatory Changes
workflows.description: Classified regulatory changes — SEC, CFTC, FinCEN, OCC, CFPB filings with event type tags and market impact scores.

workflows.name: Jurisdiction Comparison
workflows.description: Jurisdiction comparison with compliance cost modeling across US states and international frameworks.

workflows.name: Regulatory Q&A
workflows.description: Regulatory Q&A — scored answers with statutory citations and confidence levels.

workflows.name: Micro Regulatory Event Feed
workflows.description: Micro regulatory event feed — last 10 events matched to prediction markets. High-frequency bot polling.

workflows.name: Classified Regulatory Events
workflows.description: Classified regulatory event feed — SEC, CFTC, Fed, FinCEN events tagged by type, agency, and affected prediction markets.

workflows.name: Single Market Signal
workflows.description: Scored market signal — HYDRA regulatory probability, expected price impact, risk factors for one prediction market.

workflows.name: Market Resolution Verdict
workflows.description: Professional resolution verdict — HYDRA's authoritative assessment of how a prediction market should resolve, with evidence chain and confidence score.

workflows.name: FOMC Pre-Decision Signal
workflows.description: Pre-FOMC rate probabilities with Kalshi KXFED market calibration (60% market / 40% model blend), speech analysis, dot plot tracking.

workflows.name: FOMC Decision Classification
workflows.description: Real-time FOMC decision classification — HOLD/CUT/HIKE + basis points within 30 seconds of release. Cryptographic timestamp.

workflows.name: FOMC Resolution Verdict
workflows.description: FOMC resolution verdict with full evidence chain — formatted for UMA bond assertion. Includes statement text, vote breakdown, and dot plot delta.

workflows.name: UMA Oracle Assertion
workflows.description: UMA Optimistic Oracle assertion data — evidence chain, proposed price, bond parameters for regulatory market resolution.

workflows.name: Chainlink External Adapter
workflows.description: Chainlink External Adapter response — regulatory data formatted for on-chain delivery via Any API Direct Request.

workflows.name: Web Scrape
workflows.description: Web scrape — URL to clean structured text. HTML parsed, scripts removed.

workflows.name: RSS Feed Parser
workflows.description: RSS/Atom feed parser — feed URL to structured JSON with parsed entries and metadata.

workflows.name: Wallet Balance
workflows.description: Wallet balance on Base L2 — ETH and USDC balance for any address.

workflows.name: Base L2 Gas Prices
workflows.description: Base L2 gas prices — current gas price, base fee, estimated costs for transfers/swaps/mints.

workflows.name: Transaction Receipt
workflows.description: Transaction receipt lookup — confirmation status, gas used, block number, log count.

workflows.name: Batch Request
workflows.description: Batch up to 5 utility calls in one request. Saves gas costs vs individual x402 payments.

workflows.name: Multi-URL Extraction
workflows.description: Batch extraction from up to 5 URLs in parallel. Structured output per URL.

workflows.name: HTTP Headers Check
workflows.description: HTTP response headers with security headers analysis and score.

workflows.name: JSON to CSV
workflows.description: JSON array of objects to CSV with auto-detected headers.

workflows.name: CSV to JSON
workflows.description: CSV text to JSON array of objects. First row used as headers.

workflows.name: Encode/Decode Text
workflows.description: Encode/decode text — Base64, URL encoding, hex.

workflows.name: JSON Validator
workflows.description: JSON syntax validation with pretty-print and structure info.

workflows.name: Email Validator
workflows.description: Email format validation with MX record check.

workflows.name: Regulatory Pulse
workflows.description: Hourly regulatory pulse — aggregated SEC, CFTC, FinCEN, Fed, Treasury activity with risk signals.

workflows.name: Daily Market Digest
workflows.description: Daily market + regulatory digest — comprehensive summary for compliance teams and trading agents.

workflows.name: x402 Service Health
workflows.description: Real-time health and capability check of any x402 service — manifest, endpoints, pricing.

workflows.name: x402 Service Router
workflows.description: Intelligent x402 service routing — find the best service for a capability request.

workflows.name: Alert Subscription
workflows.description: Register for push alerts — webhook delivery of regulatory events matching your conditions. $0.10 per 100 alerts.

workflows.name: Alert Feed
workflows.description: Real-time regulatory alert feed — last 24 hours of detected events across all monitored sources.

workflows.name: Portfolio Watchlist
workflows.description: Portfolio regulatory watchlist — recent agency mentions and alert levels for up to 20 assets.

workflows.name: Task Orchestration
workflows.description: Multi-step task orchestration — execute up to 10 HYDRA endpoint calls in one request.
